I found one state detail in the effect-layer drop path: if overlap resolution trims the newly created hold clip, its metadata duration should match the resolved action immediately rather than only after a later save cycle. I’m tightening that now along with a small type import fix in the renderer.

The drop path is getting an actual hook-level probe instead of just static inspection. I’m mounting `useExternalDrop` in a tiny jsdom harness and forcing an occupied-range drop so I can verify the effect-layer creation lands on a visual track and goes through overlap resolution.
